g.text: and all the villages around them, to Baal
· son of Joshibiah, son of Seraiah
and Ziza — his line, each the son of the next:
they went to Gedor to seek pasture,
and struck the Meunim in Hezekiah’s days
· his sons led five hundred to Mount…
they struck the remnant of the Amalekites,
and have lived there to this day

svg.text: verse 34 — Meshobab, Jamlech, Joshah the son of Amaziah,
names as spelled in the World English Bible
